message:
test(shadow): add shadow pipeline integration tests and fixtures

Add new integration tests for shadow mode pipeline:
- shadow_pipeline_nomock.rs: test shadow pipeline without mocking
- shadow_retention_pipeline.rs: test telemetry retention in shadow mode

Add test fixtures:
- test/fixtures/shadow/: directory with test data
  - fixture_manifest.json: manifest for shadow fixtures
  - logs/: log files for testing
  - observations/: observation data for testing
  - shadow_report.json: expected report output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
